feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: What is an app for budget and commitment carry forward process in the S/4HANA Public Cloud system?
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

In the Public cloud, I used WBS Element(PS) for control budgeting.

I would like to know the app for carrying forward commitment and budgeting to next year.

Thanks,

May

entry.title: ATP not running for sales orders coming in through EDI
entry.content:
Hi,

For orders coming in over EDI it seems that the ATP check is running completely. We get a delivery date on the sales order line, but when we try to create the outbound delivery this is not possible. The error message says the "0 PC of material XXX available", even if we have the setting to be able to create outbounds without stock. If we rerun the ATP check it is then possible to create the outbound, but then the delivery dates will be wrong (as this is most often not discovered the same day as the order is created, but later in the process).

Could there be a setting in the ATP parameters missing or what could be the issue?

Kind Regards,

Cecilia

entry.title: Parallel Accounting and scope item
entry.content:
The parallel accounting I mean is what is described below-->

 

 

Question 1: Are there any scope items needed at initial scoping? The customer RaniMove cannot yet decide whether they will use parallel accounting or group reporting, but now at initial scoping we want to prepare the system so that Parallel Accounting and Group Reporting can be taken into use later. 

 

Question 2. Do you have any step by step guidance for how to configure Parallel Accounting and Group Reporting so far, that there is the readiness for the future, that it can be easily taken into use after the initial implementation project is live. 

 

Question 3: Have I understood correctly, that it is recommended to assign Accounting Principles to Ledgers and Company codes so that the Local GAAP ledger is the leading ledger and in our case IFRS is the non-leading ledger?

 

Question 4: What is the impact on this kind of assignment (Question 3) to other business processes and is there something to take into account in Asset Accounting?

 

Question 5: I would also like to check, that this is all available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and these scope items can be added with no extra cost of any license etc?

 

Please try to provide us a solution asap, since the RaniMove implementation project is now only waiting for this topic to be closed, before the Realize phase can start (initially scheduled to start 22. November).

 

Thank you I appreciate your help!

 

Marina


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Create New Payment Method - error
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have existing payment method "C" for both Standing Order and Vendor Direct Debit Collection. But it is difficult to differentiate between these two at supplier line item level, which one is Standing Order and which one is Direct Debit.

So, we want to create a new payment method "U" for Vendor Direct Debit Collection for all our Company Codes.

We are trying to create a new Payment Method for Vendor Direct Debit in Set Up Payment Methods for Each Country/Region for Payment Transactions (SSCUI 101972) and then trying to assign to Company Code in Set Up Payment Methods per Company Code for Payment Transactions  (SSCUI 101044).

But we are getting error as below:

The ID U cannot be created in Centraldata Entity Payment Methods per Country (FI)  (used by variant) 

Message no. /SMB/CENTRALDATA014

 

Please let us know how to resolve the issue and create a new payment method.

Attached error screen shot for reference.

 

Regards,

Shrinivas

entry.content:
How to create the Advance Credit Management for S4hana Public Cloud

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Application ME41 cannot be opened in S/4 Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP-Support, 

 

I'm using the application Assign and Process Purchase Requisition in the system. It is possible to mark an item as request for quotation. However, if you go to the request for quotation app and try to execute this functionality you get the message ("You are not authorized to use ME41")

I searched for the ME41 in the Fiori App library and checked for the roles (e.g. BR_Purchaser) and I'm assigned to this role.  

 

Could you please check why I get this message?

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to set up posting date for Material Inventory Migration object
entry.content:
Dear SAP support,

 

We have maintained Migration Key Date in the app Define Settings for Legacy Data Transfer but this Date is not considered in the migrations of Inventory. The system uses current date as a posting date. Could you please check? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: #COE#BUMA OSS Case Dashboard and SAP For Me Cases API with ServiceNow
entry.content:
Hello All,

Are there any API related between SAP For Me OSS Cases and ServiceNow. We want to automate the creation of incident ticket once an OSS case is created. Automation involves when the OSS case was updated, the SNOW ticket will also be updated in the worknotes. Also, is there a dashboard where we can utilize in SAP For Me to see the report overview of all the OSS case status besides the SAP For Me > Services & Support > Cases.

Thank you!

entry.title: #COE#BUMA CPI Monitoring. Automation for extracting errors and long processing processes
entry.content:
Hello All,

Is there a way to create a monitoring dashboard in CPI monitoring that lists the long running processes and error messages?

Currently there is a way to check all error messages but cannot be exported (i.e. in excel file for tracking purposes).

We also have iflows that runs for hours, so we need to monitor proactively if processed successfully.

TiA!

entry.title: API for Custom fields
entry.content:
Hi Expert！

I added custom fields in the SAP Public Cloud Service Contract.

I want to integrate the data of the added custom fields with an external system.

In this case, is it necessary to create an API (External API) for the added custom field?

 

Soma

entry.title: 2408 update VAT on Retention Payment to Supplier for UAE
entry.content: What are the specific improvements introduced by this feature, and what functionalities have been enabled as a result? Additionally, why is this feature particularly necessary in the context of the United Arab Emirates (UAE)?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAC import connection setting failure
entry.content:
I'm currently working on an import connection between my company's SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAC.
I am proceeding with the work based on the contents of the blog below, but I am having trouble creating "Communication Arrangement".

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition%E3%81%A8sap-analytics-cloud%E3%81%AE%E6%8E%A5%E7%B6%9A%E6%96%B9%E6%B3%95/ba-p/13569275

In particular
・New Communication System：Creation Success
System ID : SAC_INTEGRATION_0087
System Name : SAC Integration
・New Communication User：Creation Success
User Name: SAC_COMM_USER
Description: SAC Integration
・New Communication Arrangement：Creation failure
Scenario: SAP_COM_0087
Arrangement Name: SAP_COM_0087
・About the failure situation
"SAP_COM_0087" could not be selected in the New Communication Arrangement/Scenario column.
Could someone please tell me how to resolve it?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Deletion of Duplicate work agreement in SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

For some contingent resource, there are some duplicate worker agreement has created.

 

Kindly help us with the steps and procedure to delete worker profile and worker profile from Manage workforce App.

 

It will be helpful for us to work on this.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: value date is not shown in the "Display Line item in general ledger"
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

 

We are not able to reconcile bank entry based on value date. As the value date column in not shown in the "Display Line item in general ledger."  Please resolve the same as soon as possible as it is creating  a lot of chaos and we are not able to track payment based on value date.

 

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue eDocument Cockpit Greece - MyData
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

We received the following error from MyData in Greece for our Invoice. 

S:101:000 Line:1.Position:1020.The element 'invoice' in namespace 'http://www.aade.gr/myDATA/invoice/v1. 0' has invalid child element 'invoiceSummary' in namespace 'http://www.aade.gr/myDATA/invoice/v1.

Do you know how we can overcome that?

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: ES version, if there are more than 100,000 fixed assets, the impact on the operation of the system
entry.content: #SAP S4HANA Cloud 公共版#SAP S4HANA Cloud 公共版财务#SAP S4HANA Cloud ;在 SAP ES 版本中，如果固定资产超过 100,000 个，对系统运行的影响，系统运行是否非常缓慢？

entry.title: App Manage Bank Accounts (F1366A) – Error in create payment groups
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

Trying to execute the scope Basic Bank Account Management (BFA) we have noticed that the app Manage bank accounts doesn’t appear to create the payment group, we tried to create using CBC however is not reflecting the right way at Fiori

Reference test done:

Manage Bank Account App

Select the bank account and click on go in the upper right.

Displaying on the screen click on Edit in the upper right.

Search for: Payment Approvers

When we click on approver group we cannot find any group created

 

CBC configuration done:

We created the group “test”

Can you please check the reason for this “error”? Looking forward to your reply.

Best regards,

entry.title: Automatic payments – payment data is not transferred to Payment proposal
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

When performing Automatic payments, payment data is entered in journal entry or assigned in App Manage Supplier Line Items.

When the payment proposal is created, this payment data is lost and payment needs to be reallocated again.

The error shown in exceptions is No Valid Payment Method Found

In app Manage Automatic Payments in View Log the following is displayed 


goto View log herein you will see the following stated 
> House bank is selected ...
> No suitable bank can be selected for comp.code & pmnt meth. & curr. &  (& in place of actual values shown)
> No permitted payment method exists 



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Public-Sales-Billing form -txt n' logo-What is the right masterform template for GB (great britain)?
entry.content:
I would like to know what is the right Master form for GB Billing form templates.

I've tried to use: 

SOMU_FORM_MASTER_LETTER
SOMU_FORM_MASTER_A4

 

Both of them the Header text (company address) doesn't appears in the output document.

I've checked and the footer is working fine, so I suppose its something related to the page size.

I've been doing this configuration for Brazil and with A4 the header text is there, but for GB none of the 2 options doesnt work.

 

Thanks.
